mapper.select: select id, name, description, created_at, created_by from app_roles order by name
mapper.insert: insert into app_roles (id, name, description, created_at, created_by) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, current_timestamp, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: select id, code, description, created_at from app_permissions order by code
select p.code from app_role_permissions rp join app_permissions p on rp.permission_id = p.id where rp.role_id = #{roleId} order by p.code

select distinct r.name from app_user_role_assignments ura join app_roles r on r.id = ura.role_id where ura.user_id = #{userId} and ura.valid_from <= now() and (ura.valid_to is null or ura.valid_to > now())

select distinct p.code from app_user_role_assignments ura join app_role_permissions rp on rp.role_id = ura.role_id join app_permissions p on p.id = rp.permission_id where ura.user_id = #{userId} and ura.valid_from <= now() and (ura.valid_to is null or ura.valid_to > now())
select id, username, password, grade, created_at from app_users order by username
mapper.insert: insert into app_users (id, username, password, grade, created_at) values (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{grade}, current_timestamp)

insert into app_user_profiles (user_id, full_name, email, phone_number, birth_date, email_verified, phone_verified, last_verified_at) values (#{userId}, #{fullName}, #{email}, #{phoneNumber}, #{birthDate}, #{emailVerified}, #{phoneVerified}, #{lastVerifiedAt})
mapper.update: update app_user_profiles set full_name = #{fullName}, email = #{email}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, email_verified = #{emailVerified}, phone_verified = #{phoneVerified}, last_verified_at = #{lastVerifiedAt} where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select user_id, full_name, email, phone_number, birth_date, email_verified, phone_verified, last_verified_at from app_user_profiles where user_id = #{userId}

select u.id, u.username, u.password, u.grade, u.created_at from app_users u join app_user_profiles p on p.user_id = u.id where lower(u.username) = lower(#{username}) and lower(p.email) = lower(#{email}) limit 1
select id, user_id, role_id, tenant_id, project_id, valid_from, valid_to, granted_by from app_user_role_assignments where user_id = #{userId} order by valid_from desc
mapper.insert: insert into app_user_role_assignments (id, user_id, role_id, tenant_id, project_id, valid_from, valid_to, granted_by) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{tenantId}, #{projectId}, #{validFrom}, #{validTo}, #{grantedBy})
